skin.wrappers:
<html skin-version="">
<% TITLE %>
<% CSS %>
const currentTheme = localStorage.getItem("theme"); if (currentTheme == "dark") { document.documentElement.classList.toggle("dark-theme"); } else if (currentTheme == "light") { document.documentElement.classList.toggle("light-theme"); }
<body id="" class="perms_g- user-">
<a href="/index.php?showuser=" class="mobilenav-avatar">
Home Members ACP UCP Recent Topics Recent Clicks Log in Register Logout
Guidebook Face Claims Factions Magic Map Site Codes Shop Discord
Switch account from: <% SUBACCOUNTS %> Alerts () Messages () Log in Register Toggle skin
Etheria
a middle fantasy roleplay
Welcome
News
<a href="/index.php?showuser=">
<% SUBACCOUNTS %>
alerts msgs log in register
<a class="bp-avatar" href="/index.php?showuser=">
You are either descended from a First Monarch or are one of the undeity's champions. Either way, you can manipulate ether and produce magic. But magic seems so minute when the Seven Jeweled Courts are at odds.
Etheria is a private, middle fantasy animanga role play with focuses on magic, political intrigue, religious clashes, and interpersonal relationships.
Guidebook Face Claims Factions Magic Map Site Codes Shop Discord
Oct 24 / The Jade-Pearl War has begun. See announcement for more details.
Oct 13 / We have skipped Septidor and are now in Octaire.
Sep 25 / September Activity Check begins and will end on the 30th.
Aug 27 / August Activity Check begins and will end on the 31st. Please see discord for more information.
Aug 1 / Julidor has begun and hosts the Amethyst festival, Latha Bealltainn.
May 29 / The first activity check is now live until June 1. Please check in through the UCP, check discord for more info.
May 16 / The Onyxian Masquerade event is now live.
April 26 / The site is now open for reading and registration. No reservations or profile submissions will be accepted until tomorrow at 5pm EST.
Event 4: Isle of Acheron
<% NAVIGATION %>
Dear guests, Etheria is a private, invite-only site dedicated to finishing the story we've progressed for seven months.
We are not accepting any new members at this time. Please check back later.
<% BOARD HEADER %>
<% BOARD %>
<% AFFILIATES %>
Skin coded exclusively for Etheria
<% COPYRIGHT %>
<% SCRIPTS %>
const btntoggle = document.querySelectorAll(".colortoggle"); const prefersDarkScheme = window.matchMedia("(prefers-color-scheme: dark)");
btntoggle.forEach(function (btntoggle) { btntoggle.addEventListener("click", function () { console.log("Theme") document.documentElement.classList.toggle("light-theme"); document.documentElement.classList.toggle("dark-theme"); var theme = document.documentElement.classList.contains("dark-theme") ? "dark" : "light"; localStorage.setItem("theme", theme); }); })

item.name: NO_TOPICS
item.div: No topics were found. This is either because there are no topics in this forum, or the topics are older than the current age cut-off.

<div class="categorywrap getstarted-cat" id="cat-">
Guidebook
Welcome to Etheria. Read through the guidebook for everything you need to know to get started and ask in the Discord if you have any questions.
Setting History Magic Timeline Profile Guide

Onyx

Sapphire
Corlucet

                        <div class="elementswrap flexrow   ">

         <a href="/index.php?act=Search&CODE=getalluser&mid="> All posts
         <a href="/index.php?act=Search&CODE=getalluser&mid=&type=topics"> All threads
         <a href="/index.php?act=Msg&CODE=04&MID="> Message
         <a href=""> Development
         <a href=""> Tracker
         <a href="" class="custom-link "> 
         <a href="/index.php?act=store&code=view_inventory&memberid="> Inventory
      

      

   







































   LOCALT3('appwrap', 'app_tab', 'app_tabcontent');








$.get(document.url);





   /** auto-tracker code by FizzyElf - https://fizzyelf.jcink.net **/
   async function FillTracker(username, params = {}) {

      /***  CONFIGURATION AREA ***/
      const config = {
         includedforums: (params.includeCategoryIds || []).map(x => "c_" + x).concat(params.includeForumIds || []),
         historyforums: params.historyForumNames || [],
         historyforumids: params.historyForumIds || [],
         missivesforums: params.missivesForumNames || [],
         missivesforumids: params.missivesForumIds || [],
         missiveshistoryforums: params.missivesHistoryForumNames || [],
         missiveshistoryforumids: params.missivesHistoryForumIds || [],
         altforums: params.altForumNames || [],
         altforumids: params.altForumIds || [],
         althistoryforums: params.altHistoryForumNames || [],
         althistoryforumids: params.altHistoryForumIds || [],
         incompforums: params.incompForumNames || [],
         incompforumids: params.incompForumIds || [],
         incomphistoryforums: params.incompHistoryForumNames || [],
         incomphistoryforumids: params.incompHistoryForumIds || [],
         ignoreforums: params.ignoreForumNames || [],
         ignoreforumids: params.ignoreForumIds || [],
         lockedclass: params.lockedMacroIdentifier || "[title=Closed]",
         lockedforums: params.archiveForumNames || [],
         lockedforumids: params.archiveForumIds || [],
         indicators: params.indicators || ['✓', '➤'],
         separator: params.separator || "|",
         username: username.replace(/&#([0-9]+);/g, (m, p1) => String.fromCharCode(p1)),
         trackerwrap: params.thisTracker || $('#trackerwrap'),
         historywrap: params.thisHistory || $('#historywrap'),
         missiveswrap: params.thisMissivesTracker || $('#missiveswrap'),
         missiveshistorywrap: params.thisMissivesHistory || $('#missiveshistorywrap'),
         altwrap: params.thisAltTracker || $('#altwrap'),
         althistorywrap: params.thisAltHistory || $('#althistorywrap'),
         incompwrap: params.thisIncompTracker || $('#incompwrap'),
         pagelimit: params.pageLimit || 5,
         previousposters: params.previousPosters || {},
         lockedregex: (params.archiveForumRegex) ? RegExp(params.archiveForumRegex) : /archive/i,
         closedthreads: (params.completedThreads) || []
      }
      if (!config.includedforums.length) config.includedforums.push("all");
      /*** END CONFIGURATION ***/
      if (/^[-\w _\d]+$/.test(params.indicators[0])) {
         params.indicators[0] = ``
      }
      if (/^[-\w _\d]+$/.test(params.indicators[1])) {
         params.indicators[1] = ``
      }
      if (/^[-\w _\d]+$/.test(params.indicators[2])) {
         params.indicators[2] = ``
      }

      /***  RUN THE SEARCH ***/

      let href = `/index.php?act=Search&CODE=01&nomobile=1`;
      let data = '';
      try {
         //console.log(`fetching ${href}`);
         data = await $.post(href, {
            keywords: "",
            namesearch: config.username,
            forums: config.includedforums,
            searchsubs: "1",
            prune: "0",
            prune_type: "newer",
            sort_key: "last_post",
            sort_order: "desc",
            search_in: "posts",
            result_type: "topics",
         });
         //console.log('success.');
      } catch (err) {
         console.log(`Ajax error loading page: ${href} - ${err.status} ${err.statusText}`);
         config.trackerwrap.append('
Search Failed');
         return;
      }
      doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(data, 'text/html');

      let meta = $('meta[http-equiv="refresh"]', doc);
      if (meta.length) {
         href = meta.attr('content').substr(meta.attr('content').indexOf('=') + 1) + '&st=0';
         //.log('sessionid = ' + href.match(/&searchid=([a-zA-Z0-9]+)&/)[1]);
         //console.log('search = ' + href);
      } else {
         let boardmessage = $('#board-message .tablefill .postcolor', doc).text();

let empty = '
None'

if (boardmessage.includes("we did not find any matches to display")) {

         config.trackerwrap.append(empty);
         config.historywrap.append(empty);
         config.missiveswrap.append(empty);
         config.missiveshistorywrap.append(empty);
         config.altwrap.append(empty);
         config.althistorywrap.append(empty);
         config.incompwrap.append(empty);
}
         return;
      }

      await parseResults(href, config, 0);

   }



   parseResults = async (searchlink, config, page) => {
      let doc;
      searchlink = searchlink.replace(/&st=\d+/, `&st=${page * 25}`);
      let data = '';
      try {
         //console.log(`fetching ${searchlink}`);
         data = await $.get(searchlink);
         //console.log('success.');
      } catch (err) {
         console.log(`Ajax error loading page: ${searchlink} - ${err.status} ${err.statusText}`);
         console.log(err)
         config.trackerwrap.append('
Search Failed');
         return;
      }
      doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(data, 'text/html');


      $('#search-topics .tablebasic > tbody > tr', doc).each(function (i, e) {
         if (i > 0) {
            const cells = $(e).children('td');
            const location = $(cells[3]).text();
            const location_id = $(cells[3]).find('a').attr('href').match(/showforum=([^&]+)&?/)[1]
            const threadLink = $(cells[7]).children('a').attr('href');
            const thread_id = threadLink.match(/showtopic=([^&]+)&?/)[1];
            if (!config.ignoreforums.includes(location) && !config.ignoreforumids.includes(location_id)) {
               const locked = $(cells[0]).find(`${config.lockedclass}`).length
                  || config.lockedforums.includes(location)
                  || config.lockedforumids.includes(location_id)
                  || config.lockedregex.test(location)
                  || config.closedthreads.includes(thread_id);
               const title = $(cells[2]).find('td:nth-child(2) > a').first().text();
               const threadDesc = $(cells[2]).find('.desc').text();
               const history = config.historyforums.includes(location) || config.historyforumids.includes(location_id);
               const missives = config.missivesforums.includes(location) || config.missivesforumids.includes(location_id);
               const missiveshistory = config.missiveshistoryforums.includes(location) || config.missiveshistoryforumids.includes(location_id);
               const alt = config.altforums.includes(location) || config.altforumids.includes(location_id);
               const althistory = config.althistoryforums.includes(location) || config.althistoryforumids.includes(location_id);
               const incomp = config.incompforums.includes(location) || config.incompforumids.includes(location_id);
               const incomphistory = config.incomphistoryforums.includes(location) || config.incomphistoryforumids.includes(location_id);
               const lastPoster = $(cells[7]).find('a[href*=showuser]').text().trim().replace(/&#([0-9]+);/g, (m, p1) => String.fromCharCode(p1));
               const lastPosterId = $(cells[7]).find('a[href*=showuser]').attr('href');
               let myturn = (config.username == lastPoster) ? 'Caught Up' : 'Owing';
               if (config.previousposters[thread_id]) {
                  myturn = (lastPoster == config.previousposters[thread_id].replace(/&#([0-9]+);/g, (m, p1) => String.fromCharCode(p1))) ? 'Owing' : 'Caught Up';
               }
               const symbol = (myturn == 'Caught Up') ? config.indicators[0] : config.indicators[1];

               let postDate = $(cells[7]).html();
               postDate = postDate.substr(0, postDate.indexOf('
'));
               const sep = (threadDesc) ? config.separator : '';

               if (history) {
                  config.historywrap.append($(`

                      ${config.indicators[2]}
                      ${title}
                      
 ${threadDesc} `));
               } else if (missives) {
                  config.missiveswrap.append($(`

                      ${symbol}
                      ${title}
                      
 ${location} ${sep} ${threadDesc} 
 Last by ${lastPoster}, ${postDate}`));
               } else if (missiveshistory) {
                  config.missiveshistorywrap.append($(`

                      ${config.indicators[2]}
                      ${title}
                      
 ${threadDesc} `));
               } else if (alt) {
                  config.altwrap.append($(`

                      ${symbol}
                      ${title}
                      
 ${location} ${sep} ${threadDesc} 
 Last by ${lastPoster}, ${postDate}`));
               } else if (althistory) {
                  config.althistorywrap.append($(`

                      ${config.indicators[2]}
                      ${title}
                      
 ${location} ${sep} ${threadDesc} `));
               } else if (incomphistory) {
                  config.incompwrap.append($(`

                      ${config.indicators[2]}
                      ${title}
                      
 ${threadDesc} `));
               } else {
                  config.trackerwrap.append($(`

                      ${symbol}
                      ${title}
                      
 ${location} ${sep} ${threadDesc} 
 Last by ${lastPoster}, ${postDate}`));
               }
            }
         }

      });

      if ($('#search-topics .tablebasic > tbody > tr', doc).length == 26 && page < config.pagelimit) {
         page = page + 1;
         await parseResults(searchlink, config, page)
      } else {
         if (!config.trackerwrap.children().length) {
            config.trackerwrap.append($('
None'));
         }
         if (!config.historywrap.children().length) {
            config.historywrap.append($('
None'));
         }
         if (!config.missiveswrap.children().length) {
            config.missiveswrap.append($('
None'));
         }
         if (!config.altwrap.children().length) {
            config.altwrap.append($('
None'));
         }
         if (!config.incompwrap.children().length) {
            config.incompwrap.append($('
None'));
         }
         if (!config.missiveshistorywrap.children().length) {
            config.missiveshistorywrap.append($('
None'));
         }
         if (!config.althistorywrap.children().length) {
            config.althistorywrap.append($('
None'));
         }
      }
   }








 /** auto-tracker code by FizzyElf - https://fizzyelf.jcink.net **/
   trackerParams = {
      //include
      includeCategoryIds: ['3','5'],
      includeForumIds: ['6','15', '17','32'],
      ignoreForumIds: ['24', '25', '26', '29'],

      //define au, missives, incomp, archive forums
      historyForumIds: ['15'], //history
      missivesForumIds: ['6'], //missives
      missivesHistoryForumIds: ['23'], //missives history
      altForumIds: [], //alt
      altHistoryForumIds: ['31','34'], //alt history
      incompHistoryForumIds: ['22'], //incomp history

      //set indicators
      indicators: ['ph ph-pen-nib', 'ph ph-pen-nib', 'ph ph-pen-nib-straight'],
   }
   FillTracker(``, trackerParams);




var str = $('.app-name').text().split(" ");
$('.app-name').empty();
str.forEach(function(a) {
  $('.app-name').append(' ' + a.slice(0, 1) + '' + a.slice(1))
})










if($('.app-magic-extras').find('i').length !== 0) {
  $('.app-magic-extras').css('display', 'none');
}

if ( $(this).is(':empty') ) { console.log("Empty CW") $(this).append("none") }
});
if($('#entry').find('.posttemp7').length !== 0) { $('#entry .post7-headerbg').append('') $('#entry .post7-icon').append('') }

div.div: <a href="" title="Go to last post" style="background-image: url()">
